cast.name: Mickey Gilmore
cast.character: Man Getting Ice Cream with Son

plot outline: A depressed mother's husband has left her for she could not bear a second child. Living alone with her only son, she has an unlikely meeting with an injured escaped convict, and reluctantly takes him into her own care. The man proves to be better than his criminal image as the three bond over Labor Day weekend. The only problem? Everyone in town is looking for him.
title: Labor Day
akas: Trapped to the Summer (Japan, English title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
